ffmpegPath.description: Custom FFmpeg binary path (default: 'ffmpeg' from PATH). FFprobe is resolved from the same location when possible.

preset.description: x264 encoding preset for the stitched output.

crf.description: Constant Rate Factor used when re-encoding the stitched output.

audioBitrate.description: AAC bitrate for stitched clip audio, for example '192k'.
